General.Name: NV Nederlandsche Apparatenfabriek Nedap
General.Description: Nedap N.V., together with its subsidiaries, develops and manufactures electronic equipment and software in the Netherlands, Germany, rest of Europe, North America, and internationally. It offers software services, which support healthcare institutions in planning, registering, and administering care processes. Its healthcare software services include Nedap MediKIT, a cloud-based HIS designed to grow with general practitioners and their practices; Luna, an electronic day calendar that helps people with cognitive disabilities manage activities of daily life; and Nedap Ons, a comprehensive EHR solution that supports the full care process. The company also provides sensor-based cow monitoring and management solutions comprising Nedap Cow Monitoring Platform, which establishes an integrated, modular platform that connects sensors, insights, and automation tools to create solutions; and SmartSight, an AI-driven solution that uses computer vision to deliver actionable insights on cow health. In addition, it offers retail solutions that consist of Nedap iD Cloud, which utilizes RFID technology to streamline operations; and Nedap Sense that provides loss prevention and point-of-sale solutions. Further, the company provides security solutions comprising Nedap Access, which offers secure management of identities, credentials, and access rights; Nedap Pace, a physical identity and access management system; and Nedap Readers, which provides vehicle and perimeter access with long-range identification. Additionally, it offers UV lamp driver technologies for use in industrial curing and disinfection. The company serves healthcare, livestock, retail, and security markets. Nedap N.V. was founded in 1929 and is headquartered in Groenlo, the Netherlands.
